case_title: IN RE: JAN BERNARD LAMBOY CAOILI

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER LAMBOY CAOILI, JAN BERNARD ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

NAME CHANGE CALENDAR OF MAY-05-2016, NAME CHANGE CALENDAR - GRANTED PER WRITTEN DECREE. HEARING NOT REQUIRED. PROOF OF PUBLICATION IN THE CASE FILE. IT APPEARS TO THE SATISFACTION OF THE COURT THAT ALL THE CONTENTIONS IN THE PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME ARE TRUE AND CORRECT, AND THAT THE PETITION SHOULD BE GRANTED. THE COURT GRANTS PETITIONER'S REQUEST TO CHANGE HIS NAME FROM JAN BERNARD LAMBOY CAOILI TO JAN BERNARD CAOILI ROCETA. DECREE CHANGING NAME IS SUBMITTED TO AND SIGNED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN. CLERK: MEREDITH GRIER. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (D514).
COPYING FEES (3 PAGE, 3 CERTIFIED COPY) PAID BY PLAINTIFF LAMBOY CAOILI, JAN BERNARD
